song.title: He Reigns
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . F 1) It's the song of the redeemed . C G Rising from the African plain . F It's the song of the forgiven . C G Drowning out the Amazon rain . F The song of Asian believers . C G Filled with God's holy fire . F It's every tribe, every tongue, every nation . C G A love song born of a grateful choir
[C] Chorus . It's all God's children singing . F C Glory, glory, hallelujah . G He reigns, He reigns . It's all God's children singing . F C Glory, glory, hallelujah . G He reigns, He reigns -!! [V2] . F 2)Let it rise above the four winds . C G Caught up in the heavenly sound . F Let praises echo from the towers of cathedrals . C G To the faithful gathered underground . F Of all the songs sung from the dawn of creation . C G Some were meant to persist . F Of all the bells rung from a thousand steeples . C G None rings truer than this
[B] Bridge . F And all the powers of darkness . C G Tremble at what they've just heard . F 'Cause all the powers of darkness . C G Can't drown out a single word
